skills.name: opennomos-task-ops
skills.description: Coordinate OpenNomos project-task workflows: discover live tasks, classify automation level, stage content drafts through media-operator, run browser flows, and validate completion through event stream.

skills.name: media-operator
skills.description: Use agent-browser to help users publish content to social media platforms. Activate when the user needs to publish content, push articles, upload posts, or post to social platforms.
